Could you write a simple Python script to fetch data from an API?

Certainly! Here is a simple Python script using the requests library.

import requests
response = requests.get('https://api.example.com/data')
print(response.json())

1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890 1234567890

Now explain it to me.

مرحبا كيف حالك؟
